NCT02540993.name: FIDELIO-DKD
NCT02540993.group: Finerenone 10-20 mg PO daily | nsMRA (T2D + albuminuric CKD; vs Placebo; FIDELIO composite kidney endpoint)

allOutcomes.title: Composite of kidney failure + sustained >=40% eGFR decline + renal death finerenone vs placebo (FIDELIO-DKD primary; median 2.6 yr)

NCT02540993.snippet: Bakris GL et al. NEJM 2020;383:2219-2229 (FIDELIO-DKD). First nsMRA Phase 3 in DKD. Approved 2021.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. NCT02545049.name: FIGARO-DKD
NCT02545049.group: Finerenone 10-20 mg PO daily | nsMRA (T2D + CKD with less severe albuminuria; vs Placebo; FIGARO CV composite; kidney composite secondary)

allOutcomes.title: Composite kidney endpoint finerenone vs placebo (FIGARO-DKD pre-specified secondary; median 3.4 yr)

NCT02545049.snippet: Pitt B et al. NEJM 2021;385:2252-2263 (FIGARO-DKD). Broader DKD population; kidney composite as secondary endpoint.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Men or women ≥18 years of age~* Subjects with Type Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus as defined by the American Diabetes Association~* Diagnosis of Diabetic Kidney Disease with persistent high albuminuria or persistent very high albuminuria at the Run-In and Screening Visit~* Pretreated with either angiotensin-converting enzyme inhibitor (ACEI) or angiotensin receptor blocker (ARB) at maximal tolerated labeled dose without adjustments~* Serum potassium <=4.8 mmol/L~Exclusion Crite...

NCT02065791.name: CREDENCE
NCT02065791.group: Canagliflozin 100 mg PO daily | SGLT2i (T2D + albuminuric CKD; vs Placebo; CREDENCE composite primary)

allOutcomes.title: Composite of ESKD + doubling serum creatinine + renal/CV death canagliflozin vs placebo (CREDENCE primary; median 2.6 yr)

NCT02065791.snippet: Perkovic V et al. NEJM 2019;380:2295-2306 (CREDENCE). First SGLT2i dedicated renal-outcomes trial. Stopped early for efficacy.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 30 Years; healthy volunteers: f. NCT03036150.name: DAPA-CKD
NCT03036150.group: Dapagliflozin 10 mg PO daily | SGLT2i (CKD +/- T2D; vs Placebo; DAPA-CKD composite primary; stopped early for efficacy)

allOutcomes.title: Composite of >=50% eGFR decline + ESKD + renal/CV death dapagliflozin vs placebo (DAPA-CKD primary; median 2.4 yr; stopped early for efficacy)

NCT03036150.snippet: Heerspink HJL et al. NEJM 2020;383:1436-1446 (DAPA-CKD). Extended SGLT2i renal benefit to non-T2D CKD. Stopped early.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; max age 130 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Provision of signed informed consent prior to any study specific procedures~* Female or male aged ≥18 years at the time of consent~* eGFR ≥25 and ≤75 mL/min/1.73m2 (CKD-EPI Formula) at visit 1~* Evidence of increased albuminuria 3 months or more before visit 1 and UACR ≥200 and ≤5000 mg/g at visit 1~* Stable, and for the patient maximum tolerated labelled daily dose, treatment with ACE-I or ARB for at least 4 weeks before visit 1, if not medically contraindicated,~Exclusio...

NCT03594110.name: EMPA-KIDNEY
NCT03594110.group: Empagliflozin 10 mg PO daily | SGLT2i (CKD broader eGFR/albuminuria spectrum; vs Placebo; EMPA-KIDNEY composite primary)

allOutcomes.title: Composite of progressive kidney disease + CV death empagliflozin vs placebo (EMPA-KIDNEY primary; median 2.0 yr)

NCT03594110.snippet: Herrington WG et al. NEJM 2023;388:117-127 (EMPA-KIDNEY). Largest SGLT2i renal trial; broader CKD inclusion.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Age ≥18 years or at full age as required by local regulation~* Evidence of chronic kidney disease at risk of kidney disease progression defined by at least 3 months before and at the time of Screening Visit~  * CKD-EPI eGFR ≥20 to <45 mL/min/1.73m² or~ * CKD-EPI eGFR ≥45 to <90 mL/min/1.73m² with urinary albumin:creatinine ratio ≥200 mg/g (or protein:creatinine ratio ≥300 mg/g);~* Clinically appropriate doses of single agent RAS-inhibition with either ACEi or ARB unless ...

NCT03819153.name: FLOW
NCT03819153.group: Semaglutide 1 mg SC weekly | GLP-1 RA (T2D + CKD; vs Placebo; FLOW composite primary; stopped early for efficacy)

allOutcomes.title: Composite of kidney failure + sustained >=50% eGFR decline + renal/CV death semaglutide vs placebo (FLOW primary; median 3.4 yr; stopped early for efficacy)

NCT03819153.snippet: Perkovic V et al. NEJM 2024;391:109-121 (FLOW). First GLP-1 RA dedicated renal-outcomes trial. Extends benefit to incretin class.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. Japan: Male or female, age above or equal to 20 years at the time of signing informed consent~* Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes mellitus~* HbA1c less than or equal to 10% (less than or equal to 86 mmol/mol)~* Renal impairment defined either by:~  1. serum creatinine-based eGFR greater than or equal to 50 and less than or equal to 75 mL/min/1.73 m^2 (CKD-EPI) and UACR greater than 300 an...

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: Trial-specific primary composite kidney endpoint (eGFR decline + ESKD + renal/CV death, varying definitions)
NMA_CONFIG.note: k=6 trials, 5 drugs vs Placebo, Pbo-star. Finerenone has 2 pivotal trials (FIDELIO + FIGARO) which improves its within-drug precision. Outcome definitions differ (DAPA-CKD uses 50% eGFR decline vs others 40%; FIDELIO+CV death vs FIGARO CV endpoint primary); pragmatic extraction of trial-primary composite HR with transitivity concern declared.

title: RapidMeta Nephrology | Modern Cardiorenal Therapies in CKD (+/- T2D) NMA v1.0
